message:
feat(raptorq): deterministic decision-reason labels for dual-kernel dispatch

Add DualKernelDecisionReason enum with 8 variants covering every gate in the
dual-kernel dispatch logic: ForcedSequentialMode, ForcedFusedMode,
InvalidWindowConfiguration, TotalBelowWindow, TotalAboveWindow,
LaneBelowMinFloor, LaneRatioExceeded, EligibleAutoWindow. Each variant has a
stable as_str() for structured logging.

New DualKernelDecisionDetail struct pairs the decision with its reason, enabling
callers to observe not just what was decided but why — critical for benchmark
telemetry and debugging policy behavior.

Refactor dual_mul_decision_with_policy and dual_addmul_decision_with_policy
(renamed to *_detail_*) to return DualKernelDecisionDetail instead of bare
DualKernelDecision. The Auto-mode logic is decomposed from a single boolean
chain into early-return gates via new window_gate_reason() helper, each
returning the specific rejection reason. Existing public API functions
(dual_mul_kernel_decision, dual_addmul_kernel_decision) preserved as thin
wrappers extracting .decision for backward compatibility. New *_detail public
functions exposed for callers needing reasons.

New test dual_policy_decision_reasons_cover_forced_and_gate_failures exercises
all 8 reason variants: eligible auto-window, lane below min floor, total below
window, total above window, lane ratio exceeded, forced sequential, forced
fused, plus as_str() verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
